metadata.description: Plugins for orchestrating coding workspaces from issue boards — supports Vibe Kanban and GitHub Projects.

plugins.name: vk-orchestrator
plugins.description: Orchestration and plan-to-board skills for Vibe Kanban — checks for open tasks, manages workspace lifecycle, starts new workspaces, and creates issues from plans.

plugins.name: github-orchestrator
plugins.description: Orchestration and plan-to-project skills for GitHub Projects — checks for open tasks, manages workspace lifecycle, starts new workspaces, and creates issues from plans.
